purpose: Define the final repository backlog and terminal completion criterion so the plan is no longer an open-ended numbered stage sequence.

repositoryTerminalWhen: Stage 48A-48Z is merged to main and synchronized from main.
This final backlog / terminal completion criterion manifest is merged to main.
The final backlog guard and preflight pass from main.
No repository file defines Stage 49A-49Z or another automatic next numbered batch.
Remaining work is represented as external approval, operator acceptance, or future product-change intake rather than an active numbered repository stage.
notTerminalIf: A repository file introduces a new numbered batch without an explicit new plan decision.
A protected project-memory file claims external legal, clinical, or medical correctness approval as repository proof.
Lovable reports that the final backlog / terminal completion criterion is not synchronized from main.

finalBacklog.criterion: Confirm final backlog / terminal completion criterion from main after merge.
Approve production clinical workflow outside git before relying on it operationally.
Review legal archive sufficiency, privacy posture, and local SOP approval outside repository evidence.
Any future numbered batch or feature must start from a new explicit plan decision, not from automatic Stage 49 momentum.

expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: final backlog / terminal completion criterion synced from main, no conflicts.
